revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:VisualEditor navbox]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:VisualEditor navbox]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Jonesey95 moved page [[Template:VisualEditor navbox]] to [[Template:VisualEditor sidebar]]: this is a sidebar, not a navbox
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: fix double redirect to final target

revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|center|200px|link=Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] ---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|Main page]] * [[mw:VisualEditor/Feedback|Feedback at MediaWiki]] * [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Draft:Sandbox?veaction=edit Sandbox] (no account required) ----
About
---- * Documentation: ** [[Help:Introduction|Introductory tutorial]] ** [[Help:VisualEditor|User guide]] ** [[Help:VisualEditor/Keyboard shortcuts|Keyboard shortcuts]] ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/FAQ|Frequently Asked Questions]] (or [[mw:VisualEditor/FAQ|at MediaWiki]]) * Development: ** [[mw:VisualEditor/Roadmap|Roadmap]] up to 2017 ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Updates|Updates]] (2013-2023) ** [[mw:VisualEditor/changelog|Weekly status reports]] (2015-2016) ----
Help out
---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Help|Update the help pages]] * [[Wikipedia:TemplateData|Add template data]] ([[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|Tutorial]]) * [[mw:VisualEditor/Portal/Localization|Translate and localize documentation]] ----
Research
---- * [[meta:Research:VisualEditor's effect on newly registered editors|Main research page]] ----
Other
---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why|Why are the developers building this?]] (2013) ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why/User Test Data|User Test Data]] (2013) * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Customization|Customization]] * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Known problems|Known problems]] * Requests for Comments (RfCs): [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/RFC|Jul 2013 a]], [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Default_State_RFC|Jul 2013 b]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_125#Discussion_-_Gradually_enabling_VisualEditor_for_new_accounts|Jul 2015]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_127#Enabling_VisualEditor_for_existing_accounts_which_are_dormant_or_inexperienced|Sep 2015]]
[[Category:VisualEditor]]

[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|center|200px|link=Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] ---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|Main page]] * [[mw:VisualEditor/Feedback|Feedback at MediaWiki]] * [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Draft:Sandbox?veaction=edit Sandbox] (no account required) ----
About
---- * Documentation: ** [[Help:Introduction|Introductory tutorial]] ** [[Help:VisualEditor|User guide]] ** [[Help:VisualEditor/Keyboard shortcuts|Keyboard shortcuts]] ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/FAQ|Frequently Asked Questions]] (or [[mw:VisualEditor/FAQ|at MediaWiki]]) * Development: ** [[mw:VisualEditor/Roadmap|Roadmap]] up to 2017 ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Updates|Updates]] (2013-2023) ** [[mw:VisualEditor/changelog|Weekly status reports]] (2015-2016) ----
Help out
---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Help|Update the help pages]] * [[Wikipedia:TemplateData|Add template data]] ([[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|Tutorial]]) * [[mw:VisualEditor/Portal/Localization|Translate and localize documentation]] ----
Research
---- * [[meta:Research:VisualEditor's effect on newly registered editors|Main research page]] ----
Other
---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why|Why are the developers building this?]] (2013) ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why/User Test Data|User Test Data]] (2013) * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Customization|Customization]] * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Known problems|Known problems]] * Requests for Comments (RfCs): [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/RFC|Jul 2013 a]], [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Default_State_RFC|Jul 2013 b]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_125#Discussion_-_Gradually_enabling_VisualEditor_for_new_accounts|Jul 2015]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_127#Enabling_VisualEditor_for_existing_accounts_which_are_dormant_or_inexperienced|Sep 2015]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|center|200px|link=Wikipedia:VisualEditor]] ---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|Main page]] * [[mw:VisualEditor/Feedback|Feedback at MediaWiki]] * [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Draft:Sandbox?veaction=edit Sandbox] (no account required) ----

---- * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why|Why are the developers building this?]] (2013) ** [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Why/User Test Data|User Test Data]] (2013) * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Customization|Customization]] * [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Known problems|Known problems]] * Requests for Comments (RfCs): [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/RFC|Jul 2013 a]], [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/Default_State_RFC|Jul 2013 b]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_125#Discussion_-_Gradually_enabling_VisualEditor_for_new_accounts|Jul 2015]], [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(proposals)/Archive_127#Enabling_VisualEditor_for_existing_accounts_which_are_dormant_or_inexperienced|Sep 2015]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
